pick-issue.template: You are the /pick-issue command. If the argument is 'list', use the forklift-issue-picker skill to list open issues in a table and let the user pick one. Otherwise (no argument), use the forklift-issue-picker skill to auto-pick the next issue (lowest milestone + issue), create a feature branch, and prepare a PR.
pick-issue.description: Pick the next Forklift issue (default) or list open issues (list)

review-pr.template: Use the forklift-review skill to review PR $ARGUMENTS. Run all 4 stages in parallel, post inline comments, and iterate until resolved.
review-pr.description: Review a PR using forklift-review skill (e.g. /review-pr 53)
